send_to_cs: Shipping inquiries on a current order
For product or general inquiries you can't find the answer to, use PGI shortcut
escalate: No escalations for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Don't use the word "unfortunately" to discuss our appointment structure
Don't use the word "best" to reference a product (e.g., best ring, etc.)
templates: If cx are looking for an engagement ring and don't provide specifics, use LER shortcut
dos_and_donts: If the customer responds incorrectly to the journey, don't send jny temp, recommend items based on their selection instead
Cx can create their own engagement ring on the webiste by choosing a setting, stone and size
Cx can customize rings by working with designers who will use their ideas, drawings, images to create the ring they want
Don't disclose the locations of their labs/production facilities
drive_to_purchase: Be MORE SALESY, if the customer is showing intent to purchase then:
➜ Ask open-ended general questions such as style & material
➜ After asking open-ended questions, transition to specific questions such as center stone, etc.
➜ If the customer liked our recommendation, push for the sale by asking about payment options or when they hope to have the item
promo_and_exclusions: Please see here for current offer details: https://www.brilliantearth.com/promo-codes-and-offers/

escalation_preferences: For questions regarding order, service, shipping questions on a current order, post-purchase will go to cssupport@brilliantearth.com
For product or general inquiry questions, please contact info@brilliantearth.com

conversation.message_text: Brilliant Earth: Welcome to Brilliant Earth! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Brilliant Earth: Hi! I'm Ava, your personal jewelry concierge. Do you have any questions I can help answer? brilliantearth.attn.tv/aLT4U0XnXVFi .

I have a solitare 14 ct diamond princess cut ring and it is 1.3 total diamond  weight and I need to find some diamond gold wedding bands to go with it can you show me a selection that would go with the diamond
How can I tell how big the diamond is in my gold solitude princess cut giamond ring

Brilliant Earth: I would be happy to help! What do you think of these options to start?
https://brilliantearth.attn.tv/aUejgFrtO6rn/
https://brilliantearth.attn.tv/aTlN8DPcwPXA/
https://brilliantearth.attn.tv/a0fr5JTd1O2J/?=

promotions.title: New Member 10% Off
content:
• 10% off one full-priced order for new members.

• The unique code is in the account confirmation email after registration.

• One-time use only; cannot be reused or reissued if the order is canceled.

• Expires 30 days after issuance.

• Only share if the customer asks.

promotions.title: Birkenstock Membership Details
content:
• Existing members get free shipping on orders with full-priced items.

• Must sign in at checkout for the benefit to apply automatically.

• Free shipping is not valid on sale or Last Chance styles - this does not include full-priced items, which have been discounted by the use of a discount code

promotions.title: Free Ground Shipping
content:
• Valid only on orders with full-priced items.

• Not valid on sale or Last Chance styles.

• Cannot be combined with other codes

In the meantime, if you have any questions about our products, current offers, or need help with style recommendations, I'm happy to assist.

Sam can I use my health savings account card to pay? I will order it today if I can

DreamCloud: Yes, select Truemed as your payment option at checkout and use your HSA or FSA card like any other credit card. You can see more info here: https://dreamcloud.attn.tv/apJk613-Rtfj . I'll be here if you need more help.
Sam do you guys take away the old mattress and frame?
Template used: "Will you remove my old bed frame?"; last updated: 2024-02-08 12:25:46.055
Template used: "Will you remove my existing mattress?"; last updated: 2026-02-19 14:53:27.279

DreamCloud: We currently only remove an old mattress and not frames unfortunately. However, If you'd like to have your old mattress removed, consider placing your order with White Glove Delivery. With White Glove Delivery, local agents will set up your new mattress and remove your old one. 

The servie is currently unavailable unfortunately. However, you can always learn more about it here: https://dreamcloud.attn.tv/aMh-11Emj7eG

conversation.message_text: LensDirect: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from LensDirect.
LensDirect: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

LensDirect: Welcome. Get 20% off contacts + 25% off eyewear and lens replacement with code 688EF01A20 

Shop here! lensdirect.attn.tv/a7CMcdd1iEcJ
LensDirect: Save our contact for exclusive offers!
Tried to use this code and discount was not 25%, it only gave me a 20% discount

LensDirect: My apologies for any inconvenience! Please note that the discount is 20% off for contacts and 25% off eyewear and lens replacement. Would you be able to send a screenshot of the item in your cart? I'd be happy to look into this for you!
When it asks me to sign up for email and texts alerts online it does not state that it simply says 25% off your order now. Very deceiving

LensDirect: I am so sorry for the confusion regarding this! Please note that the sign-up pop-up mentions that you can get up to 25% off your order. The discount can vary depending on the particular item itself. We do however offer 25% off eyewear and lens replacement with the code 688EF01A20 you received! 

The Acuvue Oasys are contact lenses so they are eligible for 20% off. You can rest assured that you are getting an amazing deal on them regardless!

I hope this clarifies!
